name: Forgotten Supplies
description: "Noah recalls a container that got blown off-course before it could be recovered. With Colony 9 short on supplies, now is a good time to go look for it."

name: Tau-Tirkin Alliance
description: "Colony Tau gives the Tirkins provisions every year to bolster their alliance. Ask Rowland for more details."

name: Challenge Battles!
description: "Investigate the mysterious light that has appeared on the banks of Llyn Nyddwr in the Fornis region. (You can get there starting partway through chapter 3.)"

name: Champion of the Nopon
description: "Head to the Great Idalla Ravine to make the acquaintance of a new Hero. (You can get there starting partway through chapter 3.)"

name: For the Sake of Keepsakes
description: "Masha has asked the party's help fulfilling Jake and Tessa's order. Don't let her down!"

name: Going Full HD
description: "In order to upgrade their HD Ether Cylinders+, the party decides to visit Sunny and Cheerio's caravan"

name: Lapidarist Extraordinaire
description: "Head to Serene Square to make the acquaintance of a new Hero. (You can get there starting partway through chapter 5.)"

name: More Challenge Battles!
description: "It seems that the Archsage occasionally comes up with something new... (You must complete "Challenge Battles!" first.)"

name: The Hope of Noponkind
description: "Ino requires the party's help to defeat the Nopon Eater, the monster threatening Nopon peace and prosperity. Do it for the Nopon!"

name: A Gray Matter
description: "The party make an unusual find in Millick Meadows, bringing them into conflict with an unidentified man, who was searching for the same thing."

name: A Nopon's Counsel
description: "Go and find a gemstone that Riku will like as you make your way through the Urayan Tunnels."

name: A Twist of Fate
description: "Suddenly reunited with the party, the party invite Cammuravi to live on his own terms. Safety can be guaranteed in the City, for the time being."

name: Doing It My Way
description: "On the Erythia Sea, the party finds itself going head-to-head with a Moebius who goes by the name of Triton."

name: Going Beyond Power
description: "Kyrie got separated from her unit yet again. Bring her back to Colony Gamma."

name: Her Reasons
description: "Defeat Commander Alexandria, and capture Colony Iota."

name: Inhumanity
description: "A mysterious girl appeared, piloting a fearsome Levnis. Just who is this person...?"

name: Natural Selection
description: "As the party move through Maktha Wildwood, they are ambushed by Agnian Soldiers, defeating them."

name: No Want of Courage
description: "Colony 4 is running out of medical supplies. Taion has a plan to solve it. Follow his lead."

name: The Kind Right Hand
description: "After climbing up a cliff that continues on to the Great Sword, the party fends off a Levnis-backed force."

name: The Wrath of Ashera
description: "The commander of Colony 11, Ashera, invites the party to join her on her personal battlefield. They're not very excited about what's to come..."

name: Transparent Dreams
description: "The party find Fiona attempting to single-handedly repel a Kevesi raid on Colony Mu. Unable to stand idly by, Noah and co. offer her their assistance."

name: Unwavering Resolve
description: "Lambda uses the Urayan Tunnels to mine ether. Unfortunately, there's been a cave-in. Go check it out."

name: Vandham's Heir
description: "Curious about the man who gave them the opportunity to choose a different life, the party decide to go and ask Monica about Guernica."

name: Where The Heart Is
description: "Rumor has it that a raid on Colony 9 is planned. If true, it can't be ignored. Go there, and help your comrades."

name: A Deep-Seated Scar
description: "Consul R has declared war on Colony 11. Ashera has been awaiting this with rabid anticipation, and now...the games can finally begin."

name: A Farewell Reset
description: "Distrust is growing in Colony Mu toward Fiona, who feels unable to tell them the truth about Irma. Help her regain the colony's trust."

name: Culinary Repertoire
description: "After hearing a Nopon speak of the legendary Tempapa's cuisine, Manana decides to try and become his disciple."

name: Effervescent Heart
description: "Looking to refresh himself, Isurd sets out in search of something called a "spa". Go to the City to find out more."

name: From Atop Her Throne
description: "While Melia was out with the party, various problems arose at the Castle. Continue to work together with her to resolve the issues."

name: Grasping My Future
description: "The party search for the highest location in Aionios for Nia, who wishes to be closer to the skies."

name: Happiness
description: "Miyabi and Manana decide to take part in the City's customary cook-off. Can they go all the way and win?!"

name: I'm a Mechanic
description: "Lieutenant Yuzet has collapsed from overwork. To fulfill his duty as commander, Valdi decides to head to Colony Lambda."

name: Inescapable Past
description: "As Colony Iota holds a tech summit with Colony 30, the previous loss lingers in Alexandria's mind. Some mediation between the colonies is required."

name: Invisible Bond
description: "At Segiri's request, Sena and the party head to Colony Lambda to get ingredients to make onigiri for the people of Colony 0."

name: Knowing Your Family
description: "Some Lost Numbers were attacked by a giant monster in the Fornis region. Go with Ghondor to investigate."

name: My Memories
description: "Triton recalls how someone handed something to him about 100 years ago. Go and look for it if you like."

name: Payback for Treason
description: "Some Lost Number hardliners are up to something. Work with Rozana to stop their scheme."

name: Promise to the Future
description: "Go to Michiba Canteen to hear out Monica, who doesn't see eye to eye with Garrett or the Ouroboros candidates."

name: Reasons to Evolve
description: "Due to the crop field issues and the emetaters, Zeon has found himself in a bind. Help him and Colony 9 weather the storm."

name: Shadow of Enmity
description: "The newbies' training will end with large-scale maneuvers on Everblight Plain. Head there."

name: Side Story: Eunie
description: "It appears Colony 5, now at Gold rank, can't be contacted. Meet up with Bolearis and investigate."

name: Side Story: Lanz
description: "Lanz seems interested in what the Lost Numbers' training sessions are like. Go to the City's training ground."

name: Side Story: Mio
description: "Before heading to the Cloudkeep, the party decides to first investigate Colony Omega."

name: Side Story: Noah
region: Elaice Highway (Zain's Talon), Low Maktha Wildwood (Gingin's Treehouse)
description: "In search of the last Origin Metal, the party head to Gardin Defense Base, which is east of Keves Castle."

name: Side Story: Sena
description: "You Received a monster culling request from Monica to secure the Material Storage Warehouse at the Great Sword."

name: Side Story: Taion
description: "Taion receives a call from Isurd. Give Command a visit next time you drop by Colony Lambda."

name: Survivors
description: "Upon returning to Colony Tau, the party find the Consul, who defeated the monsters, waiting for them... Hear her out for now."

name: Chapter 1
description: "Fighting for Colony 9, Noah, Lanz, Eunie and Mwamba go toe-to-toe in battle with soldiers from Colony Sigma. Then, once the dust settles..."

name: Chapter 2
description: "With their eyes set on Swordmarch,Noah and co. decide to head south through the Aetia region."

name: Chapter 3
description: "With the Flame Clock now destroyed, Noah and co. have a few things they need to do around Colony 4."

name: Chapter 4
description: "Departing Colony Lambda, Noah and co. once again set their sights on reaching Swordmarch."

name: Chapter 5
description: "The party escapes the Castle, with Swordmarch now within reach."

name: Chapter 6
description: "Noah gets lost, grasping amidst the fog..."

name: Chapter 7
description: "Noah learns about Moebius and Ouroboros from Queen Nia. The time has finally come to confront Z."

name: A Chance Encounter
description: "Eilis hasn't returned to Colony 9. She might have gone somewhere in the area of Li Garte Prison Camp. Find her and bring her back safe."

name: A Difficult Transition
description: "Fox may be raiding nearby colonies to solve the food shortage. Gather intel, and then stop him."

name: A Lesson in Off-Seeing
description: "Schoon from Zakir's squad asked for Noah to teach her. As her senior in off-seeing, show her how it's done."

name: An Off-Seer's Anguish
description: "Colony 9's new off-seer appears to be struggling with some problems. Try asking the people that know him what's troubling him"

name: Crusader For Spuds
description: "Raising Spongy Spuds has put an end to Colony 9's food shortages. Now go and spread the good word to the other colonies!"

name: Extracurricular Lesson
description: "Thanks to a rigorously impartial lottery, Mio will be teaching Kyrie, although what she is actually hoping to learn about is a cause for concern and intrigue..."

name: Farewell Melody
description: "Lenny's friends were killed by monsters while on a mission. Head to Sonata Saddleback to see them off."

name: For Colony 9
description: "Dissenting against Zeon's leadership, Kite and his friends leave Colony 9. Ask Fox for details, and then bring them back."

name: Friendly Support
description: "The team that was to rendezvous with Laurea has gone missing in action. To find them, head for Shark's Jaws Cape"

name: In Search of a Home
description: "The party suggest that the baseless Colony 0 move into Li Garte Prison Camp. Negotiate the proposal with Ghondor first."

name: Lean Times in Colony 9
description: "Colony 9 faces a supply shortage. Find reusable things on the old battlefields to send back to Camilla."

name: Live Combat Training
description: "Foots's squad, who excel in combat, asked for Eunie and Sena's guidance. Teach them what they need to know."

name: Nopon Register
description: "Shillshill has asked you to confirm names and bring back stones from Nopon belonging to each caravan. You can take your time with this one."

name: Preparing for Battle
description: "Use the G you got from the Colony Sigma operation to buy and equip a new accessory for Noah."

name: Research Procedures
description: "Lanz finally got a request to teach a lesson! Show Namuki what a good, dependable teacher he is!"

name: Shared Secret
description: "Lenny and Eastman appear to have fallen out about something. Go and ask Lenny what happened."

name: Special Instructors
description: "Ysorra secretly wishes to become a medical practitioner. Invite Colony 4's doctor, Oleshandra, to support her in her studies"

name: Supplies in the Wind
description: "Retrieve the supplies requisitioned by Pollux from the salvage corps."

name: Teach's Teachers
description: "Teach has requested that the party teach the newbies. Turn them into fine, worthy soldiers."

name: The Battlescar Hulk
description: "Clear out the monsters lurking around the decrepit Ferronis."

name: The Big, Unseen Monster
description: "Dorin is making fun of Bambam, who is sure he saw a big monster. Work together with them to uncover the truth."

name: The Hillside Hulk
description: "The party finds a decrepit Ferronis on their travels. Search it to see if it contains any useful resources."

name: The Illusion Returns
description: "The mysterious Levnises from earlier have returned. The party are determined to take them down this time, once and for all."

name: Theoretical Knowledge
description: "Taion enlists Noah as an assistant for the lecture he's delivering to Zakir's squad. Don't let the newbies show you up, and show them they can trust you."

name: Going Home
description: "The formerly-imprisoned Lost Numbers are now able to go home to the City. The Castle even kindly offers to lend a boat."

name: Lost Stones
region: Li Garte Prison Camp (Communal Cell Block) (Chapter 5), Agnus Castle (Ascension Grounds) (After Chapter 5)
description: "Ruggyscruggy lost all three of his stones while busy with prison labor. Look for them in Li Garte Prison Camp's Perimeter Woodland."

name: Missing in Action
description: "Contact was lost with Dana and the others before they could make it to Farview Cape. Go look for them in the Erythia Sea."

name: Seeker's True Intent
description: "Unaware that Seeker is only trying to be kind, the City folk find his behavior suspicious. Find out why Seeker is acting like he is."

name: The Path I Forge
description: "Seeker and co. are called to the City. Ghondor says nothing bad will happen, but not a word more."

name: The Three Fiends
description: "Despite the Castle's liberation, there are still some people left locked up in its prison. Inquire into the reasons with internal security."

name: Three Fiends: Jhodor
description: "It is said Jhodor was locked up for the crime of wiping certain intel. Why did he commit the crime?"

name: Three Fiends: Tohma
description: "It is said Tohma was locked up for the crime of mass murder. Why did he do it?"

name: Three Fiends: Xera
description: "It is said Xera was locked up for the crime of blowing up containers. Why did she commit the crime?"

name: Why So Busy?
description: "Both the Lost Numbers and Agnian soldiers in the Castle seem very busy. Find out why from Seeker."

name: Acknowledging Feelings
description: "Segiri tells the party some info about old world relics they collected earlier. No. 8 seems to know more."

name: Colony Mu's Resolve
description: "Ayase has a favor to ask of Fiona and the party. Head to the much livelier Colony Mu."

name: Contrary Emotions
description: "Having somehow created tension between herself and No. 9, Sena ruminates over how they can reconcile their differences..."

name: Distress Signal
description: "Go to "the two trees" as understood from the wood pieces that washed up in Colony Mu, and save whoever sent the message."

name: First Day of Prison
description: "The first day of incarceration sees the party assigned to gathering food. Follow the warden's orders, and keep your heads down."

name: Future Trajectory
description: "With Mu united and helping each other out, Fiona is uneasy about how much less she has to do. Ask Tallow if there's anything she can help out with."

name: Missing Luggage
description: "Dorin and Bambam are arguing over who lost the luggage. Find the luggage, then help them make up."

name: New Names
description: "Sena is asked to give new names to the citizens of Colony 0. She decides to think back on past events for inspiration."

name: Prison Refurbishment
description: "To make the former prison camp more livable, first speak with No. 6, who manages the colony's supplies, about how to go about the interior refurbishment."

name: Prison Spring Clean
description: "The amount of monsters in the vicinity of the former prison camp has increased. Work with Colony 0 to clear them out."

name: Second Day of Prison
description: "Today, the party is sent to subjugate an enraged Feris. Whoever succeeds will be excused from other tasks, so get subjugating!"

name: Shut-In
description: "No. 15 has shut himself in a Ferron unit. Worried for his wellbeing, the party try to coax him out."

name: The Atoll Hulk
description: "Clear out the monsters lurking around the decrepit Ferronis."

name: The Castle Beckons
description: "Before beginning the prison rescue operation, you'll first need to talk to Kisame in Vinisog Holm. Board the Boundary and set out to the Erythia Sea."

name: The Future I Want to Spin
description: "You've received a call for help from Tussore at newly-independent Colony Mu. Go see if she's safe."

name: The Mysterious White Fog
description: "The white fog that troubled Noah and co. has been implicated in a string of disappearances around the Erythia Sea. Get to the bottom of the matter."

name: The Sandbar Hulk
description: "Clear out the monsters lurking around the decrepit Ferronis."

name: The Ultimate Vessel
description: "Find Origin metal from across Aionios to finish the ultimate vessel, and conquer the Great Sea's vortex."

name: Third Day of Prison
description: "The guard has taken a shine to the party, and shows it by giving them yet more work to do. Hang tight till Ghondor gives the cue."

name: To Face Forward
description: "Tallow's rep has worsened. To resolve the discord in Mu, you lend an ear to everyone again."

name: Treasured Memory
description: "Mu's gates have been improved. Go inspect them to see if anything else can be done to help prevent invasion."

name: Unease
description: "An unease is spreading through Colony Mu. Fiona wants to see if she can do something to reassure everyone."

name: Uniting the Seven Nopon
description: "Bring together all seven of the Nopon who wield Ultimate Hammers, and they will fuse Origin shards together for you, and upgrade the party's Blades."

name: Unspeakable Being
description: "The party find a curious monument somewhere in the Erythia Sea. Your Nopon companions are leery of making an offering to it... But why?"

name: File:XC3 The Future I Want to Spin.jpg
A Young Noble's Request
description: "Young Shiner of House Ortiz has sent the party a rescue request. Go look for Playne's squad at Cape Arcaphor in the Erythia Sea."

name: Castle Access
description: "Ghondor, currently in Agnian custody, knows the location of the true Queens. The first step in the prison rescue is talking to Samon in engineering."

name: Choices
description: "The City folk are worried that Moebius know where the City is. Ask Monica and Travis for more details."

name: Colony 15 Soldiers Missing
description: "The Colony 15 soldiers seem to have gone missing from the City. Stop by Michiba Canteen to find out more."

name: Counterpoint
description: "In attempting to play the score she picked up in the City, Mio discovers that it's unfinished. Ask around in the City to find out who wrote it."

name: Friendship
description: "Find a Bright Fig in Maktha Wildwood, and take it to Triton's drinking buddy, Jaggar."

name: Joulietta and Romero
description: "Go see Romero and Joulietta to find out if their marriage talks have progressed any further."

name: Life in the City
description: "Walk around the City, and see how the Colony 15 soldiers are adapting to their new environment."

name: Lovebirds
description: "It turns out Gray is a member of the Lost Numbers. Go meet his partner who is in the City, waiting for him."

name: Romero and Joulietta
description: "Left to his own devices, Romero is likely to get himself killed. Bring back a Jeweled Pebble for the sake of his romantic relationship."

name: Shock to the System
description: "Upon finding a poorly-looking old woman in the City, the party decide to hurry her to the Medical Facility."

name: The Key to a New Home
description: "The City's Homecoming has been called off this year. Ask the members of the Six Houses and this year's Homecomers why."

name: The Kids' Aspiration
description: "The City children appear to be planning something in Ribelly Square. Go and see what's up."

name: The Scavenger Force
description: "Curious about the Lost Numbers' scavenger force, the party decide to find them in the N'ohm Wetlands and get to know them better."

name: Unsolved Riddle
description: "The party is invited by some City kids to help solve a riddle. Search for what is "at foot of 15 light"."

name: Writer's Block
description: "Something called "novels" seem to be very popular in the City. Go to Wellwell's store to see if you can buy one."

name: File:XC3 The Key to a New Home.jpg
A Burning Curiosity
description: "How do Agnian Levnises float? Work with Ymeer from the maintenance and development team to find out the answer to this curious question"

name: A Burning Curiosity, Part 2
description: "Ymeer is frustrated that his research has reached a dead end. Acquire parts from the "Mechapod Carthegia" to help get his research up and running again."

name: Alexandria's Birthday
description: "Nobody can seem to reach Chickadee. Inquire around Colony Iota for more information."

name: Bearing Fruit
description: "Collectopedia Cards are being used in unexpected ways among the liberated colonies. Help solve some lingering issues with the system."

name: Beyond Mercy and Revenge
description: "Go visit Laszlo who is in the Colony 4 Canteen."

name: Big Friendly Friend
description: "Valdi has been leaving all his commander-type work to his lieutenant, Yuzet...See if there is a better way to arrange all this "

name: Bugs
description: "It seems the Collectopaedia is experiencing issues, with duplicate and unreadable posts. Find someone with specialist knowledge and ask them about it."

name: Charity and Hypocrisy
description: "Colony 4 is under threat from a large monster force. The party decide to help them, while remaining wary of meddling in their affairs *too* much..."

name: Collapsed Traderpon
description: "The party finds a collapsed Nopon Merchant in Eagus Wilderness. Help rehydrate the poor thing."

name: Dorin and Bambam
description: "A certain Nopon from maintenance and development has gone missing. Ask M&D chief Dinzel to see if he knows the errant Nopon's whereabouts"

name: Dorrick is Online!
description: "Dorrick project's phase nine is a live combat test. Go to the Terra Wastelands to see Dorrick in action."

name: Enemies and Allies
description: ''Go to Colony Iota's Storehouse. It seems that Alexandria wants to open up about colony affairs in the hope of gaining the party's trust''

name: Exhausted Supplies
description: "The procurement division is being flooded by supply requests from every department. Help them out."

name: Fear of the Unknown
description: "An odd noise reverberating in the area is spooking Bambam and Dorin. Go find the source of it to put their minds at rest."

name: Finite Time
description: "Taion decides to help procure some supplies to confirm the accuracy of Colony Iota's intel, though is decidedly unimpressed by Fili's attitude."

name: Fla'ran's Request
description: "Follow Maxie's instructions, and ask Fla'ran for information on one of the monsters threatening the colony."

name: Harvest Day
description: "In Colony Iota, soldiers who have contributed greatly are rewarded on Harvest Day, but one of them seems to be missing. Go find the soldier in question."

name: Helping Out
description: "With the southward route blocked and roadworks ongoing, now's as good a time as any to see who might need helping in Colony 4."

name: Jeremy's Request
description: "Follow Maxie's instructions, and ask Jeremy for information on one of the monsters threatening the colony."

name: Melody of Mourning
description: "Hearing about some husks left abandoned by Singbreeze Funnel, the party set out to try and see them off."

name: Missing Parts
description: "The parts for Mechafriend have gone missing during maintenance. Ask around to see if anyone knows where they are."

name: Riku and Manana
description: "Now that you've set up camp at the oasis for the night, help Manana make a scrumptious meal."

name: Rousing Bolearis
description: "Losing Ethel has caused Bolearis to sink into a deep funk. Go see how he's getting on."

name: Scant Supplies
description: "Due to sending other colonies lots of supplies, Colony Iota itself is running short. See if you can help them out with that."

name: Serene Melody
description: "Stories arise of a Colony 30 Nopon aspiring to become an off-seer. Go meet him and find out his motivation."

name: Severed Connection
description: "A squad secretly dispatched to other colonies was attacked by parties unknown and wiped out. Search the site of the attack to find out who did it."

name: So Much More to See
region: Rae-Bel Tableland (Bittley Slope), Old Cliffside Way (Old Way Camp), Erythia Sea (Sea Lizards' Tide Pool), Captocorn Peak (Piula Path)
description: "Bambam is out cold! Dorin is desperately hurrying him over to Oleshandra back at Colony 4..."

name: Tactical Eradication
description: "Maxie, whom the party saved previously, asks them to eliminate a certain three boss monsters. Ask his subordinates for more details."

name: The Desert Hulk
description: "Clear out the monsters lurking around the decrepit Ferronis."

name: The Final Cog
description: "Dorrick is finally complete. Go to the Terra Wastelands to take part in the grand unveiling."

name: The Missing Squad
description: "A Colony 30 squad sent into Dannagh Desert hasn't returned, and communications are down. Go there, and check on their well-being."

name: The Ouroboros Experiment
description: "Falling into Salazar's trap, the party is left in Dannagh Desert. Meet her, and get your supply distribution authorization back."

name: The Tableland Hulk
description: "Clear out the monsters lurking around the decrepit Ferronis."

name: The Thrill of the Hunt!
description: "Past the strange cave filled with mechanical contraptions, the party finds a bizarre Nopon named Burrburr. See what has got her so excitable."

name: The True Culprit?
description: "Pulipuli raises concerns when he comes up in conversation with Widgewidge. Find him hiding in maintenance to discuss Mechafriend."

name: There's No Ether!!!
description: "Colony 30 has run out of ether cylinders. You'll need to procure over 2,000 of them to restart Dorrick's construction."

name: Wish Upon a Clover
description: "Ven, a Colony 30 mechanic, seems to be collecting Fourtune Clovers. Try finding out where best to harvest them"

name: Yorde's Request
description: "Follow Maxie's instructions, and ask Yorde for information on one of the monsters threatening the colony."

name: File:XC3 The Thrill of the Hunt!.jpg
A Dark Cloud
description: "According to guards Heath and Wynonna, dissidents in the Castle are plotting something. Go to the ether mine to investigate."

name: A Warrior's Pride
description: "Make contact with Zoren's squad."

name: An Artist
description: "Apparently, there is an artist at Fort O'Virbus. Go meet him."

name: Colony 9's Backup
description: "Colony 9 has requested backup following a recent Origin attack. Go there with Melia."

name: Fate
description: "Sigrún requests the party escort Zoren back to the fort. Just what is the relationship between those two…?"

name: Festival of War
description: "Ashera invites the party to a mock battle, but she won't be taking part. Instead, she decides to coerce someone else to join the party's side this time"

name: Friction With Agnus
description: "The Agnian troops Aizel provoked have rallied together to become a rebel force. Go to Agnus Castle to discuss and resolve the issue."

name: Indomitable
description: "Make contact with Clad's squad."

name: Leaders in Training
description: "Many of Fort O'Virbus's leaders-in-training underestimate you. Show them beyond any doubt that experience trumps simple knowledge."

name: Merciless Pursuit
description: "Some soldiers have deserted from Colony 11. Hurry to Maktha Wildwood where they escaped to."

name: Rules of the Hunt
description: "Make contact with Easel's squad."

name: The Castle Guard
description: "The Captain of the Guard is looking for the party. Go and see what she needs."

name: The City Pep Talk
description: "Melia receives a request from Monica asking her to offer some words of encouragement to the City. Head there together with her."

name: The New Inspector
description: "Inspector Ulrich wants to check in on the colonies that the party liberated. Guide him through the liberated colonies."

name: The True Inspector
description: "The inspector was allegedly seen in the basement storehouse at night. Go to the storehouse, and uncover the truth."

name: Three Ravens at War
description: "Ashera entrusts Colony 11 to the party. For starters, meet each of the "Three Ravens", her squad leaders, and get them on-side."

name: A More Balanced Recipe
description: "Dorin is angry at Bambam for giving him Glare Aubergine, which he can't stand. Show him that it can be a part of a delicious meal."

name: Cultural Exchange
description: "Honorine arrived at Colony Tau along with some Nopon, which are a rare sight there. Go check up on them."

name: Duty
description: "Lamda's off-seer appears to have met his end... Go and see how Moraine is coping with it."

name: Imminent Illusion
description: "From out of nowhere, a mysterious Levnis materializes, blocking the way of the party."

name: Korresia Finds Her Calling
description: "Korresia has returned from Colony Gamma, and is now a specialist in making accessories. Go see how she is doing."

name: Lambda's Problem
description: "Colony Lambda's Ferronis is out of commission, which inconveniently puts its canteen out of use too. Suggest a plan to the head of manufacturing."

name: Learning from Lambda
description: "Selin has borrowed an ether-detecting probe from Colony Lambda. Go help him out."

name: Lost Friend
description: "Worryingly, contact has been lost with Imogen, who was headed to Colony 4. Go see if she is all right."

name: New Developments
description: "Varen is developing something to strengthen Lambda's defenses. Go see how he's getting on."

name: Off-Seeing Customs
description: "Colony Tau has its own peculiar customs. However, since the last major battle, many of their comrades' husks still lie where they fell..."

name: Past and Present
description: "Lambda is reeling in shock from the Koji case. Go with Isurd to discuss it with the captains."

name: Restart
description: "Colony Lambda's Auto-Levs still can't be restarted. Talk to the head of engineering to find out why."

name: Securing Supplies
description: "The supplies prepared for the battle with Colony 5 are at the Urayan Trail. Help with their recovery."

name: Stolen Provisions
description: "While they slept, the party's stored provisions were stolen by Tirkins. Search the nearby area for ways to replenish the supplies."

name: Surplus Supply
description: "All the ether Colony Lambda has been mining has created a surplus. Talk with Koji about how best to use the extra resources."

name: The Cascade Hulk
description: "Clear out the monsters lurking around the decrepit Ferronis."

name: The Clifftop Hulk
description: "Clear out the monsters lurking around the decrepit Ferronis."

name: The Harvest
description: "Now self-sufficient, the time has come for Colony Tau to harvest its crops. The only issue is that they are short of manpower. Go offer them your help."

name: The Hunt of Plenty
description: "New ninth-termers of Colony Tau traditionally head alone to the lower levels to take part in the "Hunt of Plenty". Ask Raine about it."

name: The Hunter
description: "Raine went out hunting despite his injuries, and has now been found. Ask Geum for more details."

name: The Lost Off-Seer
description: "Lambda's off-seer seemed to have gone to the Fornis region through the tunnels, but no search party has been sent out. In light of this, go look for him instead."

name: The Wildwood Life
description: "Deep in Maktha Wildwood, the party encounter a mysterious Nopon. Accompany her."

name: Water of Rhonnar
description: "It is said in Colony Tau that the Spring of Rhonnar's water makes you stronger. Lanz and Sena want to see if it's true. Go investigate the rumor."

name: File:XC3 So Much More to See.jpg
